title: Piroe linked with Rangers again - gossip
summary: Rangers are reportedly interested in signing Leeds forward Piroe again. The Scotland striker has vowed to remain at his Serie A club, highlighting ongoing transfer speculation around the player.
content: Rangers to rekindle interest in Leeds forward as Scotland striker vows to stay at Serie A strugglers...

zh.title: 皮罗再度传言与流浪者队有关 - 八卦
zh.summary: 据报道，流浪者队再次对签约利兹前锋皮罗感兴趣。这位苏格兰前锋誓言要留在他的意甲俱乐部，凸显了围绕该球员的持续转会猜测。

title: 'You don't want an opportunity just because you're female'
summary: FIFA has implemented a new rule requiring every team in international women's football tournaments to have at least one female head coach or assistant coach. Leading female footballers including Alex Scott and Ellen White discuss the policy's implications.
content: Alex Scott, Fara Williams, Ellen White and Steph Houghton debate Fifa's new ruling that every team in international women's football tournaments must have at least one female head coach or assistant coach.

zh.title: "你不想仅仅因为自己是女性就获得机会"
zh.summary: 国际足联实施了一项新规则，要求国际女子足球赛事中的每支球队至少要有一名女性主教练或助理教练。包括亚历克斯·斯科特和艾伦·怀特在内的领先女性足球运动员讨论了该政策的含义。

title: Man City have psychological edge over Arsenal - Rooney
summary: Wayne Rooney argues that Manchester City hold a psychological advantage over Premier League leaders Arsenal in their title race. The assessment highlights the momentum dynamics between the two clubs.
content: Wayne Rooney says Manchester City have the psychological edge over leaders Arsenal in the Premier League title race.

zh.title: 曼城对阿森纳有心理优势 - 鲁尼
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼辩称曼彻斯特城在英超争夺中对领跑者阿森纳持有心理优势。这一评估突出了两支球队之间的势头动态。

title: Brentford to host World Sevens as Villa & Man Utd enter
summary: Aston Villa and Manchester United will participate in this year's Women's World Sevens tournament, which will be hosted at Brentford. The event represents a significant milestone for women's rugby sevens.
content: Aston Villa and Manchester United will compete in this year's Women's World Sevens tournament, which will be hosted in Brentford.

zh.title: 布伦特福德将举办世界七人橄榄球赛，阿斯顿维拉和曼联参赛
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉和曼联将参加今年的女子世界七人橄榄球赛，该赛事将在布伦特福德举办。该赛事代表了女子橄榄球七人制的重要里程碑。

title: The Wayne Rooney Show
summary: Wayne Rooney examines whether Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta's side are faltering while Pep Guardiola's Manchester City find peak form. The analysis focuses on the momentum shift in the Premier League title race.
content: Are Arteta’s Arsenal cracking just as Guardiola’s Manchester City hit top gear?

zh.title: 韦恩·鲁尼秀
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼分析阿森纳主帅米克尔·阿尔特塔的球队是否在衰落，而佩普·瓜迪奥拉执教的曼城则处于巅峰状态。分析重点是英超联赛争冠势头的转变。
